creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
This mailing list was created in 2017 and saw no traffic except spam until it was removed in 2020.  It was never migrated from mailman to mlmmj.

It looks like we forgot to clean up references to the list from the doc/ tree when we removed the list from mailman.

We should clean up the dangling references.  I'll try to find some time unless someone beats me to it. :)
